# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nodejs-microservice
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nodejs
        image: yourrepo/nodejs:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        env: # Replace with actual ENV values
        - name: MONGO_DB_URI
          value: mongodb://your-mongo-db-endpoint
      restartPolicy: Always
